feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to release Network activity in CJ20N
entry.content:
We have a project W03.E22.T069 under which the network 40013200 has activity   0016 and activity element 0112 
We are unable to release the activity element, The activity element is not inheriting the status of parent activity
We tried to release it individually through EDIT-STATUS- RELEASE but the release option is greyed out
We created another activity element in quality and after saving it got released automatically

entry.title: ETM Compatibility Pack- How to proceed?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

I am facing a situation where I am converting my SAP system from ECC to S/4HANA. In ECC we were using ETM module, but it is not available in S/4HANA. We are not using ETM.NEXT at the moment. We are trying to use compatibility pack for ETM: 119 ID. However, I have a few queries on how to proceed further?

I have implemented the sap note provided in the simplification list. But now, how to proceed. As there is no alternate solution present for ETM, will we have to connect both the ECC and S/4HANA systems?

If yes, how will data flow proceed (ECC to S/4HANA and S/4HANA to ECC) and how can we manage all the integration points between both the systems (master data and processes)?

Or can we use ETM in our S/4HANA environment alone? 

Can someone guide me, on how to proceed with further activities?

 

 

SAP ERP Central Component 

#S/4HANA

#Compatibilty

#Compatibility Packs

entry.title: Not able to post posting difference in PI process
entry.content:
Dear Associate,

I am getting warning message when I am trying to post posting difference in difference analyzer.

entry.title: BADI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_REQDATE not triggered when the delivery block was removed
entry.content:
I am experiencing an issue where the BADI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_REQDATE it is not triggered when I remove the delivery block at the sales document header level. This BADI is designed to be set the delivery date to a later point of time.

The BAdI documentation describes a scenario with heavy weight products. In case if those heavy weight product item is first blocked via delivery block. The logic implemented within the BAdI is not triggerd again by removing the block.

Please help.

entry.title: Not able to post posting difference in Physical Inventory process
entry.content:
Dear Associate,

I am getting warning message when I am trying to post posting difference in difference analyzer.

entry.title: S/4HANA 2023 Service PO - Maximum number of SES, GR, and IR history records per PO line item??
entry.content:
For S/4HANA 2023 Service POs, do we have any internal guideline for the maximum number of SES, GR, and IR history records per PO line item before a new PO should be created to avoid performance issues in MIRO and PO history processing?

Currently seeing a performance issue in PO history processing for the Service POs.

entry.title: Standard asset report- J1IDEPCALPOST and AR02
entry.content:
There are two transaction codes for asset display report J1IDISPBLK and Depreciation Posting J1IDEPCALPOST . In both these reports there is one column of Inv. Supt. under which there are 2 issues:-

1. Negative values are being reflecting in the inv. supt. column. These should be positive values under asset additions column.

2. Secondly same values against asset codes are reflecting in AR02 Report as asset acquisitions.  Sample screenshot of AR02 of sample asset codes enclosed along with asset display report with column inv. Supt. for your reference.

entry.title: Issue : Old Fiscal Year open for Asset master data change
entry.content:
Hi

In PRD server, we have created some assets and post accusation value. Our system Fiscal year 2025 - 2026 is closed. Our Asset depreciation start date is 01.06.2026. Now we want change scarp value in the asset. But system showing the error " Fiscal Year 2026 is already closed in Financial Accounting". Our query , the all assets are created, Depr. start date 1.06.2026 (FY 2027) values are posting in FY 2027. While we change the scarp value in Asset master then why system ask to open the old fiscal year.

entry.title: Clarification on deprecation of SAP GUI transactions KB21N and KB23N in SAP S/4HANA 2025
entry.content:
Hi

We're using SAP S/4HANA 2022 On Premise and planning to upgrade to 2025. An Early Watch Report indicates that the KB21N and KB23N Apps are 'Deprecated since SAP S/4HANA 2025'.

OSS Note 3266933 confirms deprecation of Related apps in SAP S/4HANA 2023.

The SAP S/4HANA 2025 'What's New' documentation states that these apps have been replaced by Manage Direct Activity Allocation (F3697).

I need clarification on whether the term 'Apps' refers only to the Fiori apps KB21N, KB23N, KB24N or if the SAP GUI transactions KB21N and KB23N are also deprecated.

Currently, I use SAP GUI transactions KB21N and KB23N, and these are being flagged in the Early Watch Report.  We don't actually use the Apps KB21N or KB23N.

Also, I want to know if the drilldown functionality in CJI3N of Labour bookings (via CATS) will still drilldown to KB23N in SAP S/4HANA 2025.

Thanks

S

entry.title: WOCR not work properly
entry.content: Warehouse order is supposed to be created based on batch no, one batch no one WO ,but system does not follow the rule even we have setup in WOCR .

entry.title: Sales order Header and Item Delivery Block should be behavior should be do same
entry.content:
We have a requirement to align the behavior of the Sales Order Header Delivery Block and the Schedule Line Delivery Block.

Currently, the system behavior is different in both scenarios:

  1. When the delivery block is applied at the schedule line/item level, the confirmed quantity is set to 0, and the sales order goes into incomplete status.

  2. When the delivery block is applied at the header level, the confirmed quantity is also expected to become 0. However, after saving the order, the document is still shown as complete.

The expectation is that both the Header Delivery Block and Schedule Line Delivery Block should behave in the same way. If the confirmed quantity is set to 0 due to the delivery block, then the sales order should also be marked as incomplete, similar to the schedule line/item level behavior.

entry.title: Metadata error in BTP Cockpit when trying to reach S3P system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

As I am trying to do changes in the existing UI5 application developed in the BAS from my trail account I am unable to get the data for the app from S3P system from the backend. I am facing the Metadata Error and SAP Client Error.

entry.title: Order Amendement ERP
entry.content: Need to understand if we can amend or change order type and sold-to party of a sales order in ERP after it has been created and what would be the impact of it ?

entry.title: Asset Master Data Correction
entry.content: The asset has been posted with a value, but ANLA-ZUJHR (year of acquisition) is blank, and the AS02 field is grayed out and cannot be edited.

entry.title: Cannot choose sales orders from memory dropdown in system
entry.content:
In the Sales Order List report, when users try to reopen a previously accessed sales order, they can see the sales order number by pressing the spacebar, but they are unable to select the order and execute it which was happening previously. 

As a result, users must manually search for the sales order, enter it into the field, and then execute the report, which is time-consuming for the business.

entry.title: How to handle special characters and space in the standard database table in S/4 HANA 2023 SP02
entry.content:
Special characters and unwanted spaces are being stored in text fields within the standard database table. We are encountering issues when retrieving records containing these special characters, as they are not visible at the database level. However, when the extracted data is transmitted to an external system, the presence of these hidden special characters causes the interface processing to fail. 

Does SAP have any existing tool or app or program that can help identify the special characters in the database and potential remove that special character from the database?

entry.title: ASN quantity in Cumulative received Qty in the inbound DELFOR IDOC
entry.content:
Example Scheduling agreement in P01 - 1685053482

Example -

Cumulative delivered qty - 1000

Actually received by customer (GR done) - 600

ASN received by customer, still in transit - 200

In transit                                                  - 200

Customer sends cumulative received qty as 800. This is contrary to SAP design. How do we resolve this?

entry.title: Data Cleansing of SAP Standard Tables by Removing Special Characters and Spaces in S/4HANA 2023 SP02
entry.content:
Special characters and unintended whitespace are currently being stored in text fields within standard database tables. These non-printable or hidden characters are not readily visible at the database level, making them difficult to identify during data validation and analysis.

However, when records containing these characters are extracted and transmitted to external systems, they cause interface processing failures and data integration issues. 

Do SAP provide any tools or app's or programs that can detect hidden special characters within database fields and support their removal or cleansing?

entry.title: BW Infocube Compression request taking more disk space
entry.content:
Recently, we completed the BW compression activity for the years DIGITS to DIGITS in the Q system to reduce memory disk space.
However, we have noticed that the disk space has unexpectedly increased compared to the disk usage before the compression activity.
Could you please advise if there are any temporary files, log files, or other system files that can be safely cleaned up to reduce the disk space usage?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Price element on service quotation header
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for the Service line of business. Our customer has a business scenario that requires adding price conditions at the header level of a service quotation in order to apply a manually entered percentage discount.

However, when we try to add a price element at the header level, the system displays the following warning message:

You cannot add Price Element at header level.

Please see the screenshot below.

Is it not possible to add price conditions at the header level of service quotations and service orders in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, or is this a configurable restriction?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

David Avila.
